# Vault Enterprise license keys

@include 'alerts/enterprise-only.mdx'

Licenses and EULA enhancements have been introduced in Vault 1.8 release. Please refer to the [FAQ](/vault/docs/enterprise/license/faq) for common questions concerning these changes.

The [Install a HashiCorp Enterprise License](/vault/tutorials/enterprise/hashicorp-enterprise-license) tutorial provides the instruction to load your Vault license.

## How license keys work

License keys for Vault Enterprise determine the availability of product features
and for how long you may use Vault.

### Expiration and termination

Each license key has a start date and an expiration date. Once a license key
expires, Vault versions released **after** the key's expiration date will not
start, restart, or unseal. Vault versions released **prior** to the key's
expiration date will continue to start, restart, and unseal normally.

Some license keys also have a termination date. Vault will not start, restart,
or unseal with a terminated license key (though existing unsealed nodes continue
to operate until they have to restart or unseal again).

- **Commercial keys.** License keys issued since September 2025 terminate 60
  days after the expiration date. License keys issued prior to September 2025
  were either non-terminating or had a 10-year termination window.
- **Trial keys.** Trial license keys terminate on or one day after the
  expiration date.

To review the dates on a license key, run
[`vault license inspect`](./../commands/license/inspect) (for a local key) or
[`vault license get`](./../commands/license/get) (to query a Vault cluster's API).

<Note title="Compliance with license terms">

Vault's license key enforcement behaviors are not a substitute for your
compliance with your license agreement. Continued use of Vault Enterprise
following the expiration of your subscription license period may violate the
terms of your license agreement.

</Note>

<Note title="Security impact of expired keys">

Once your license key expires, you will not be able to patch Vault with security
fixes released after the key's expiration date. If your key has expired and you
need to perform an immediate update to apply critical security fixes, reach out
to your Vault support contact for a temporary trial license key.

</Note>
